alert_subject: [ALERT - Critical] Error in CuizAI - High error rate detected in CuizAI Cloud Run service
diagnosis: Investigated GCP Cloud Run logs for cuiz-ai-api service. Queried ERROR severity logs and HTTP 500 status codes for the last 24 hours. Found zero errors. All 41 recent HTTP requests returned status 200 OK. Service is healthy and ready. The alert appears to be a false positive or was triggered by a transient issue that has already resolved. Recent code changes (analytics tracking in commit 0b94394) are properly wrapped in try-except blocks and do not cause 500 errors. No bugs found in application code.
summary: No errors found in GCP logs. Service cuiz-ai-api is healthy with 100% success rate on recent requests. Alert was likely a false positive or transient issue. No code changes required.
